name: Tenyi Spirit - Ashuna
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アシュナ
desc: If you control no Effect Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control a face-up non-Effect Monster: You can banish this card from your hand or GY; Special Summon 1 "Tenyi" monster from your Deck, except "Tenyi Spirit - Ashuna", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Wyrm monsters. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Ashuna" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control no Effect Monsters: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If you control a face-up non-Effect Monster: You can banish this card from your hand or GY; Special Summon 1 "Tenyi" monster from your Deck, except "Tenyi Spirit - Ashuna", also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Wyrm monsters. You can only use each effect of "Tenyi Spirit - Ashuna" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from hand for cost
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
